welcome.title: Welcome to Markus
welcome.subtitle: Your AI workforce, ready in minutes
welcome.description: Markus lets you build and run autonomous AI agent teams that collaborate, learn, and deliver results around the clock. Let's get you set up in a few quick steps.

theme.title: Choose Your Theme
theme.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings

llm.title: Configure LLM
llm.subtitle: Agents need an LLM to think and act
llm.configuredHint: You can manage providers anytime in Settings.
llm.selectDefault: Click to set the default model for agents:
llm.noKeysFound: No API keys found. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, etc. in your .env file and restart.
llm.autoFallbackDesc: Try other providers/models if the primary fails

search.title: Web Search (Optional)
search.subtitle: Give agents the ability to search the web
search.description: Configure at least one search API key to enable agents to find real-time information. DuckDuckGo is always available as a free fallback.
search.savedHint: You can manage search API keys anytime in Settings.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

done.title: You're All Set
done.subtitle: Start building your AI workforce
done.chatDesc: Talk to agents or use Smart Route to auto-delegate tasks
done.projectsDesc: Create projects with requirements, tasks, and deliverables
done.builderDesc: Hire new agents from templates or build custom roles
done.settingsDesc: Manage LLM providers, integrations, and governance
done.telemetry: Share anonymous usage data to help improve Markus
done.telemetryNote: No code, prompts, or personal data is ever collected. You can change this in Settings at any time.

usageType.title: How will you use Markus?
usageType.subtitle: This helps us tailor your experience.
usageType.personalDesc: Individual use with your own AI agents.
usageType.organizationDesc: For teams sharing licenses and collaborating.
